mapper.delete: /* DayAvgObQtySetMapper.xml - deleteTodayDayAvgObQtyInfo */ DELETE FROM TWORK_INFO_DAY_AVG_OBQTY WHERE CTKEY = '09' AND OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND CRITDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.insert: /* DayAvgObQtySetMapper.xml - insertDayAvgObQtyInfo */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_DAY_AVG_OBQTY SELECT T.CTKEY , T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CRITDAY , T.OBSTARTDAY , MAX(T.OBCNFRMDATE) AS OBCLOSDAY , SUM(T.CNFRMQTY) AS OBQTY , AVG(T.CNFRMQTY) AS DAYAVGOBQTY , AVG(T.CNFRMQTY) * T.AVDAYS AS AVGOBQTY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE , 'BATCH' AS INSERTURKEY , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE , 'BATCH' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.ICKEY , SUBSTR(OD.OBCNFRMDATE, 0, 8) AS OBCNFRMDATE , SUM(OD.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY /* 일별 확정수량 */ , AVG.AVDAYS , CASE WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '10' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') /* 일 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '20' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days', 'YYYYMMDD') /* 주 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '30' THEN TO_CHAR((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (-1) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMMDD') /* 월 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '40' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP-AVG.CRITDAYS, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 수기입력 */ END AS OBSTARTDAY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND OD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = OD.ICKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_DAY_AVG_OBQTY AVG ON AVG.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = '09' AND OH.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('65','70') /* 65:부분출고, 70:출고완료 */ AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('65','70') /* 65:부분출고, 70:출고완료 */ AND SUBSTR(OH.OBCNFRMDATE, 1, 8) BETWEEN CASE WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '10' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') /* 일 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '20' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7 days', 'YYYYMMDD') /* 주 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '30' THEN TO_CHAR((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (-1) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMMDD') /* 월 기준 */ WHEN AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD = '40' THEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP-AVG.CRITDAYS, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 수기입력 */ END AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 days', 'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY OD.CTKEY , OD.OWKEY , OD.ICKEY , SUBSTR(OD.OBCNFRMDATE, 0, 8) , AVG.AVDAYS , AVG.CRITDAYS , AVG.OBQTYCALCRITCD ) T GROUP BY T.CTKEY , T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY , T.OBSTARTDAY , T.AVDAYS
